parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets the select threshold used for initial selection and subsequent threshold crossings

modeling_constraints: Respond to both select directions and establish selection at simulation start.
Do not add input mixing, unrelated retained state, current contributions, or validation-only hooks.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: When vsel is above vth, vout follows vin1 rather than vin2.
When vsel is at or below vth, vout follows vin2 rather than vin1.
The selected input updates after both rising and falling crossings of vsel through vth.
Before any select transition, vout is selected from the initial vsel level using the same strict-greater-than threshold rule.
The output represents one selected input and does not average or sum vin1 and vin2.

title: Analog Mux Threshold
